prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-ENAMELCOFFEEMUG-BLU Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 11.75oz Stainless Steel and Enamel Coffee Mug Camping Essentials, Classic Speckled Blue Description: Made for morning campfire coffee, evening hot cocoa or sipping tea at the top of a mountain trial, the ASR Outdoor enamel and stainless steel mug is the perfect companion for all your outdoor adventures.

Designed with versatility in mind, use the coffee mug for hot or cold drinks, soup, stews or chili, pack it with your RV accessories, with camping or backpacking gear, campfire cooking equipment, your camp kitchen lineup and more.

Lightweight and holding a generous 11.75 ounces of your favorite beverage, this camping essentials coffee mug is made from sturdy kiln hardened enamel, that will retain heat well, is highly durable, scratch and rust resistant and food safe, making it ideal for camping, hiking and many other outdoor activities.

The classic blue speckled enamel coating features an added stainless steel rolled rim for comfortable sipping. The stainless steel rim also provides strength, prevents against chipping, adding to the longevity of the coffee mug and enhancing its vintage design.

Lightweight and comfortable to hold, this enamel coffee mug will be your go to for cozy coffee breaks while camping, hiking, backpacking and more. Search Terms: Coffee mug; outdoor backpacking camping gear; enamel mug; camping essentials; RV accessories; cottage core décor; cabin décor; picnic; travel coffee mug; tailgating; bbq; campfire cooking equipment; campfire accessories; soup mug; camp kitchen Features: - ENAMEL COFFEE MUG: Rugged ASR Outdoor enamel and stainless steel coffee mug is the perfect companion for your outdoor adventures; include it with your camping and backpacking gear, RV accessories, campfire cooking equipment and more - CAMPING ESSENTIALS: Whether it’s enjoying a hot cup of coffee by the campfire or sipping tea at the top of a mountain trail, this coffee mug is lightweight, easy to clean and holds a generous 11.75 ounces of your favorite beverage - DURABLE MATERIALS: Made from sturdy kiln hardened enamel, this coffee mug will retain heat well, is highly durable, scratch and rust resistant and food safe, making it ideal for camping, hiking and other outdoor activities - STAINLESS STEEL RIM: Classic blue speckled enamel coating features an added stainless steel rim that provides strength, prevents against chipping, adding to the longevity of the coffee mug, while enhancing the classic vintage design - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3 x 3 x 3.5 inches; Weight: 0.22lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11.75oz Blue Speckled Enamel Coffee Mug

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11.75oz Classic Speckled Blue Enamel Coffee Mug

anthropic.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Rim, Kiln Hardened Enamel, Rust And Scratch Resistant, Heat Retaining, Camping And Backpacking Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Rim, Kiln Hardened Enamel, Heat Retention, Scratch And Rust Resistant, Food Safe, Lightweight
